name: Country Cheese Souffle
recipeIngredient: 2 cups skim milk, at room temperature
8 ounces extra sharp cheddar cheese, grated
6 slices white or sourdough bread, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Butter the bottom and sides of an oven-proof casserole dish, and add the bread cubes.
3. Heat butter in a saucepan over low heat until it begins to bubble.
4. Add flour and stir into a paste. Cook, stirring often, for about 3 minutes, until the flour is cooked and it begins to brown at the edges (watch carefully as it can burn easily; if it burns, start over).
5. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly until it becomes a smooth, creamy sauce.
6. Add 6 ounces of cheese, stirring to blend.
7. Add Worcestershire sauce and pepper, and more milk if needed for the desired consistency.
8. Pour about a third of the cheese sauce into the beaten eggs and stir to combine.
9. Pour this mixture back into the cheese sauce and stir well.
10. Pour over the bread cubes and sprinkle the remaining cheese on top.
11. Bake in the preheated oven for 30 - 35 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
